note: Mirror of pptx/chart-axis. Axes are created/destroyed implicitly by chartType changes — no direct Add/Remove. At chart-creation time, configure via the chart's axis* props (axismin/axismax/axistitle/axisfont/…); chart-axis covers post-creation only. Known gaps: `labelFont` writes the title run (not tick labels); `lineWidth`/`lineDash` apply to all plot-area series — use chart-series for series-specific line styling.
